name: REBEL Profile
comment:
The REBEL Profile™ combines power and versatility in a compact IP65-rated design, perfect for indoor and outdoor applications. Its Peak Field 500W 6,500K LED engine produces a dazzling 22,000 lumens, delivering high-intensity beams, sharp projections, and dynamic mid-air effects.
A full-featured graphics suite includes 15 glass gobos, a complete animation wheel, dual prisms, dual frost, and a high-speed iris. 
The indexable framing system ensures precise control with blackout shutter cuts, while a zoom range of 3.5° to 51° enhances its flexibility.Housing 18 carefully designed gobos and a 4.5° to 38° zoom, the FUZE SFX can create stunning mid-air FX as easily as precise image projections. The SFX allows for even stage washes utilizing its variable frost filter while a wide array of beautiful colors is possible from a seamless CMY color-mixing system plus color wheel. Dual independent rotating and overlaying prisms plus a fast iris round out the comprehensive feature set.
A truly remarkable compact powerhouse for any application, the FUZE SFX is sure to create amazing effects, outstanding projections and beautiful bright washes on any stage.
